PvP Quests

PvP chains are separated here so they do not get mixed into regular progression quests.

QuestCategoryTypeStartSystemObjectiveRewardChain
(PvP-1) Time to pick sidesPvPkillNo explicit starter bodyNo fixed systemDefeat 15 the quest targetsMission PvP Level 2Part 3 / 3
(PvP-2) Law and orderPvPkillNo explicit starter bodyNo fixed systemDefeat 10 another playerMission PvP Level 4Part 1 / 6
(PvP-2) Make a namePvPkillNo explicit starter bodyNo fixed systemDefeat 25 another playerMission PvP Level 4Part 1 / 6
(PvP-3) More targetsPvPkillNo explicit starter bodyNo fixed systemDefeat 10 another playerMission PvP Level 6Part 2 / 6
(PvP-3) Too easy...PvPkillNo explicit starter bodyNo fixed systemDefeat 10 the quest targetsMission PvP Level 6Part 2 / 6
(PvP-4) Demoralize the lawlessPvPkillNo explicit starter bodyNo fixed systemDefeat 8 the quest targetsMission Reach Level 6Part 3 / 6
(PvP-4) Gaining RanksPvPkillNo explicit starter bodyNo fixed systemDefeat 500 the quest targetsMission PvP Level 10Part 3 / 6
(PvP-5) A new hunting groundPvPkillNo explicit starter bodyKritillianDefeat 50 another player in KritillianMission PvP Level 14Part 4 / 6
(PvP-5) Gaining famePvPkillNo explicit starter bodyNo fixed systemDefeat 1000 the quest targetsMission PvP Level 14Part 4 / 6
(PvP-6) A new opportunityPvPkillNo explicit starter bodyMitrilionDefeat 20 the quest targets in MitrilionMission PvP Level 18Part 5 / 6
(PvP-6) Only the strongestPvPkillNo explicit starter bodyMitrilionDefeat 25 the quest targets in MitrilionMission PvP Level 18Part 5 / 6
(PvP-7) A new weaponPvPkillNo explicit starter bodyNo fixed systemDefeat 5000 the quest targetsMission PvP Level 24 PolicePart 6 / 6
(PvP-7) A new weaponPvPkillNo explicit starter bodyNo fixed systemDefeat 5000 the quest targetsMission PvP Level 24 PiratePart 6 / 6
(PvP) ReputationPvPkillNo explicit starter bodyNo fixed systemDefeat 5 another playerMission PvP t2Part 2 / 3
(PvP) Your first player killPvPkillNo explicit starter bodyNo fixed systemDefeat 1 another playerMission PvP t1Part 1 / 3
